scripts.dev:agent: cd apps/vos-agent && bun run app/main.ts serve --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8787
scripts.typecheck: cd apps/vos-cli && bun run typecheck && cd ../vos-agent && bun run typecheck
scripts.test: cd apps/vos-cli && bun test && cd ../vos-agent && bun test
scripts.build: cd apps/vos-cli && bun run build && cd ../vos-agent && bun run build
